name:
LENT 04 [A]
Second Scrutiny

lectionary.gospelTitle: A Man Born Blind Is Healed

readings.citation:
Ps 23: 1-3a, 3b-4, 5, 6. R. v.1
The Lord is my shepherd; there is nothing I shall want.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 23: 1-3a, 3b-4, 5, 6. R. v.1
The Lord is my shepherd; there is nothing I shall want.

readings.summary:
I am the light of the world, says the Lord;
whoever follows me will have the light of life.
Jesus cures a blind man on the sabbath.

antiphons.text:
The Lord anointed my eyes: I went, I washed,
I saw and I believed in God.

planningNotes: Laetare Sunday - Choir wear rose pink!

gathering.title: Be Though My Vision
gathering.description: ☘️ St. Patricks Day / Vision for the Blind Man

whoever follows me will have the light of life.

communionSongs.title: Broken Vessels
communionSongs.description: "I once was blind, but now I see..."

communionSongs.title: Christ In Me Arise
communionSongs.description: "Be now my vision, open these eyes..."
